failures: Agent cited a competitor quote of $1,975, which is accurate, but failed to provide any competing fee that matched the fees from OTHER QUOTES, affecting leverage accuracy.
Agent did not push back on specific fees or terms as much as they could have; they only referenced the fuel surcharge generically without pushing back on specific amounts.
The red flag for pricing did not seem to prompt any probing about fees or terms, even though the ORIGINAL QUOTE was significantly higher than the OTHER QUOTES.
The negotiated_total remained null in the outcome when there was a proposed offer of $2,200, which should have been logged as a price movement or updated with a value reflecting the latest offer.
